extracted.title: TPGS Pipeline Conditions for 3/10/2026
extracted.description:
The following restrictions will be in place on the Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) system for Gas Day March 10, 2026:

Tres Palacios has restricted authorized injection overrun nominations. No increases in injections will be accepted except to comply with NAESB bump guidelines.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
affectedLocations: Tres Palacios Gas Storage, LLC (TPGS) system
